title: Tokyo Announces Bold Plan to Solve Crowding by Asking Everyone to Stand Slightly More Politely
author: eastokyo-staff
excerpt: Officials believe a modest increase in politeness could create enough emotional space for everyone.
body:
Tokyo officials unveiled their newest urban initiative yesterday...

Experts described the proposal as 'aggressively reasonable.'

People are not the problem. Their elbows are.

The proposal has already received international praise...

title: Government Creates Committee To Investigate Why There Are So Many Committees
author: editorial-bureau
excerpt: The first meeting has been postponed until enough committees can review it.

title: AI Writes CEO Apology Before Company Makes Mistake
author: tech-desk
excerpt: The software achieved a 94% accuracy rate by studying corporate history.
